title: AI Thought Experiment Triggers Stock Market Plunge
summary: An AI thought experiment on Substack is causing market turmoil, reflecting Wall Street's growing fears about AI's impact.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the market's sensitivity to AI-related news and the potential for rapid shifts in investor sentiment.

title: Kalshi's Prediction Market Model Under Scrutiny
summary: Kalshi CEO defends the platform's prediction market model, arguing it's not gambling but beneficial for society.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the legality and ethical implications of prediction markets in the news and finance.

title: Trump Family Discusses 'Retribution' at Crypto Event
summary: Donald Trump Jr. denies his father's involvement as CEOs attend their crypto event amid talks of 'retribution'.

title: Oil Surges, Stocks Drop Amid Economic Stagnation Fears
summary: Oil prices hit 2023 highs due to the Iran war, causing stocks to fall amid concerns of stagnating growth and high inflation.

title: Stock Market Losses Mount Amid AI Fears

title: Tom Lee: Bitcoin's Drop Is a 'Crypto Squall,' Not a Winter
